title: Song of the Heavenly Soldiers

lines.raw: [A]Beautiful mor[E7]ning sunris[A]e, calm a[D]bove the land of[E7] our hope;  [A]
[E7]Robed in white chosen peopl[A]e, figh[D]ting for the lan[E7]d of Go[A]d.
To[A7]wering high the sno[D]w white mountain stand[Bm]s aloft in majest[E7]y.
[A]Ruling with power ove[F#m]r the world, s[Bm7]hining o'er the uni[E7]verse. [A]
[A]Marching on Heavenly S[D]oldie[A]rs, mar[F#m]ching on [Bm7]with H[E7]is love,

tokens.lyric: l with our God in Heav

lines.raw: [F#m]Unitin[D]g in [Bm]life eterna[E7]l with our God in Heav[A]en and earth.

tokens.lyric: Heavenly soldiers fighting strongly for the victory;

lines.raw: Heavenly soldiers fighting strongly for the victory;

tokens.lyric: Bringing lost souls to harvest from the fallen world of fear, Freely

lines.raw: Bringing lost souls to harvest from the fallen world of fear, Freely

tokens.lyric: giving love and beauty to them from our Parents' heart.

tokens.lyric: Spreading the word over the world, rescuing the family of God.

tokens.lyric: Sanctified, brave crusaders, join in our True Parents' fight;

tokens.lyric: Lifting high the rod of iron, smashing evils of the world!

lines.raw: Lifting high the rod of iron, smashing evils of the world!

tokens.lyric: Now restoring Eden's glory, on the earth eternally,
